members.name: ActionGetHandle
members.summary: Returns the corresponding [code]XrAction[/code] OpenXR handle for the given action RID.

members.name: BeginDebugLabelRegion
members.summary: Begins a new debug label region, this label will be reported in debug messages for any calls following this until [method end_debug_label_region] is called. Debug labels can be stacked.

members.name: CanRender
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if OpenXR is initialized for rendering with an XR viewport.

members.name: EndDebugLabelRegion
members.summary: Marks the end of a debug label region. Removes the latest debug label region added by calling [method begin_debug_label_region].

members.name: FindAction
members.signature: public RID FindAction(String name, RID actionSet)
members.summary: Returns the [RID] corresponding to an [code]Action[/code] of a matching name, optionally limited to a specified action set.

members.name: GetErrorString
members.summary: Returns an error string for the given [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrResult.html]XrResult[/url].

members.name: GetHandTracker
members.summary: Returns the corresponding [code]XRHandTrackerEXT[/code] handle for the given hand index value.

members.name: GetInstance
members.summary: Returns the [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrInstance.html]XrInstance[/url] created during the initialization of the OpenXR API.

members.name: GetInstanceProcAddr
members.summary: Returns the function pointer of the OpenXR function with the specified name, cast to an integer. If the function with the given name does not exist, the method returns [code]0[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]openxr/util.h[/code] contains utility macros for acquiring OpenXR functions, e.g. [code]GDEXTENSION_INIT_XR_FUNC_V(xrCreateAction)[/code].

members.name: GetNextFrameTime
members.summary: Returns the predicted display timing for the next frame.

members.name: GetOpenxrVersion
members.summary: Returns the version of OpenXR that was initialized. Only valid after the OpenXR instance has been created. See [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.1/html/xrspec.html#XR_MAKE_VERSION]XR_MAKE_VERSION[/url] for how the version is calculated.

members.name: GetPlaySpace
members.summary: Returns the play space, which is an [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrSpace.html]XrSpace[/url] cast to an integer.

members.name: GetPredictedDisplayTime
members.summary: Returns the predicted display timing for the current frame.

members.name: GetProjectionLayer
members.summary: Returns a pointer to the render state's [code]XrCompositionLayerProjection[/code] struct. [b]Note:[/b] This method should only be called from the rendering thread.

members.name: GetRenderStateZFar
members.summary: Returns the far boundary value of the camera frustum. [b]Note:[/b] This is only accessible in the render thread.

members.name: GetRenderStateZNear
members.summary: Returns the near boundary value of the camera frustum. [b]Note:[/b] This is only accessible in the render thread.

members.name: GetSession
members.summary: Returns the OpenXR session, which is an [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrSession.html]XrSession[/url] cast to an integer.

members.name: GetSupportedSwapchainFormats
members.summary: Returns an array of supported swapchain formats.

members.name: GetSwapchainFormatName
members.summary: Returns the name of the specified swapchain format.

members.name: GetSystemId
members.summary: Returns the ID of the system, which is an [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrSystemId.html]XrSystemId[/url] cast to an integer.

members.name: GetViewConfiguration
members.summary: Returns the view configuration type, which is an [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrViewConfigurationType.html]XrViewConfigurationType[/url] cast to an integer.

members.name: GetViewCount
members.summary: Returns the number of views. It is usually two, one for each eye, but may differ with different view configurations.

members.name: InsertDebugLabel
members.summary: Inserts a debug label, this label is reported in any debug message resulting from the OpenXR calls that follows, until any of [method begin_debug_label_region], [method end_debug_label_region], or [method insert_debug_label] is called.

members.name: IsEnvironmentBlendModeAlphaSupported
members.summary: Returns [enum OpenXRAPIExtension.OpenXRAlphaBlendModeSupport] denoting if [constant XRInterface.XR_ENV_BLEND_MODE_ALPHA_BLEND] is really supported, emulated or not supported at all.

members.name: IsInitialized
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if OpenXR is initialized.

members.name: IsRunning
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if OpenXR is running ([url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/xrBeginSession.html]xrBeginSession[/url] was successfully called and the swapchains were created).

members.name: OpenxrIsEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if OpenXR is enabled.

members.name: OpenxrSwapchainAcquire
members.summary: Acquires the image of the provided swapchain.

members.name: OpenxrSwapchainCreate
members.signature: public int OpenxrSwapchainCreate(int createFlags, int usageFlags, int swapchainFormat, int width, int height, int sampleCount, int arraySize)
members.summary: Returns a pointer to a new swapchain created using the provided parameters.

members.name: OpenxrSwapchainFree
members.summary: Destroys the provided swapchain and frees it from memory.

members.name: OpenxrSwapchainGetImage
members.summary: Returns the RID of the provided swapchain's image.

members.name: OpenxrSwapchainGetSwapchain
members.summary: Returns the [code]XrSwapchain[/code] handle of the provided swapchain.

members.name: OpenxrSwapchainRelease
members.summary: Releases the image of the provided swapchain.

members.name: RegisterCompositionLayerProvider
members.summary: Registers the given extension as a composition layer provider. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called after the OpenXR session has started. However, it can be called in [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._on_session_created].

members.name: RegisterFrameInfoExtension
members.summary: Registers the given extension as modifying frame info via the [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._set_frame_wait_info_and_get_next_pointer], [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._set_view_locate_info_and_get_next_pointer], or [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._set_frame_end_info_and_get_next_pointer] virtual methods. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called after the OpenXR session has started. However, it can be called in [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._on_session_created].

members.name: RegisterProjectionLayerExtension
members.summary: Registers the given extension as modifying [code]XrCompositionLayerProjection[/code] via the [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._set_projection_layer_and_get_next_pointer] virtual method. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called after the OpenXR session has started. However, it can be called in [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._on_session_created].

members.name: RegisterProjectionViewsExtension
members.summary: Registers the given extension as a provider of additional data structures to projections views. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called after the OpenXR session has started. However, it can be called in [method OpenXRExtensionWrapper._on_session_created].

members.name: SetCustomPlaySpace
members.summary: Sets the reference space used by OpenXR to the given [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrSpace.html]XrSpace[/url] (cast to a [code]void *[/code]).

members.name: SetEmulateEnvironmentBlendModeAlphaBlend
members.summary: If set to [code]true[/code], an OpenXR extension is loaded which is capable of emulating the [constant XRInterface.XR_ENV_BLEND_MODE_ALPHA_BLEND] blend mode.

members.name: SetObjectName
members.signature: public void SetObjectName(int objectType, int objectHandle, String objectName)
members.summary: Set the object name of an OpenXR object, used for debug output. [param object_type] must be a valid OpenXR [code]XrObjectType[/code] enum and [param object_handle] must be a valid OpenXR object handle.

members.name: SetRenderRegion
members.summary: Sets the render region to [param render_region], overriding the normal render target's rect.

members.name: SetVelocityDepthTexture
members.summary: Sets the render target of the velocity depth texture.

members.name: SetVelocityTargetSize
members.summary: Sets the target size of the velocity and velocity depth textures.

members.name: SetVelocityTexture
members.summary: Sets the render target of the velocity texture.

members.name: TransformFromPose
members.summary: Creates a [Transform3D] from an [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrPosef.html]XrPosef[/url].

members.name: UnregisterCompositionLayerProvider
members.summary: Unregisters the given extension as a composition layer provider. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called while the OpenXR session is still running.

members.name: UnregisterFrameInfoExtension
members.summary: Unregisters the given extension as modifying frame info. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called while the OpenXR session is still running.

members.name: UnregisterProjectionLayerExtension
members.summary: Unregisters the given extension as modifying [code]XrCompositionLayerProjection[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called while the OpenXR session is still running.

members.name: UnregisterProjectionViewsExtension
members.summary: Unregisters the given extension as a provider of additional data structures to projections views. [b]Note:[/b] This cannot be called while the OpenXR session is still running.

members.name: UpdateMainSwapchainSize
members.summary: Request the recommended resolution from the OpenXR runtime and update the main swapchain size if it has changed.

members.name: XrResult
members.signature: public bool XrResult(int result, String format, Array args)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the provided [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrResult.html]XrResult[/url] (cast to an integer) is successful. Otherwise returns [code]false[/code] and prints the [url=https://registry.khronos.org/OpenXR/specs/1.0/man/html/XrResult.html]XrResult[/url] converted to a string, with the specified additional information.

values.name: OPENXR_ALPHA_BLEND_MODE_SUPPORT_NONE
values.summary: Means that [constant XRInterface.XR_ENV_BLEND_MODE_ALPHA_BLEND] isn't supported at all.

constants.name: OPENXR_ALPHA_BLEND_MODE_SUPPORT_NONE
constants.summary: Means that [constant XRInterface.XR_ENV_BLEND_MODE_ALPHA_BLEND] isn't supported at all.
